title: WEIBE
subtitle: Weibo emotion analysis system
summary: A course-built system that crawled Weibo trending topics, stored posts, and visualized emotional tendencies across those conversations.

blocks.text: The main workload was system design: a Selenium crawler, MongoDB-backed storage, Python server work, and a simple frontend for exploring the results.
I would say it was decent enough for a course project, and it was interesting enough for capturing the outbreaks of Covid 19. It's publicly archived here: [WEIBE](https://github.com/Greenere/weibe)

items.alt: The word cloud of the covid day
items.caption: The word cloud on the day of covid-19
